mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO group_link_import_detail ( batch_id, line_no, raw_url, group_name, result, success_type, fail_reason, existing_origin, group_link_id, created_at ) VALUES
(#{r.batchId}, #{r.lineNo}, #{r.rawUrl}, #{r.groupName}, #{r.result}, #{r.successType}, #{r.failReason}, #{r.existingOrigin}, #{r.groupLinkId}, #{r.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link_import_detail d JOIN group_link_import_batch b ON d.batch_id = b.id WHERE

SELECT d.line_no AS lineNo, d.group_name AS groupName, d.raw_url AS rawUrl, b.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, d.result AS result, d.success_type AS successType, d.fail_reason AS failReason, d.existing_origin AS existingOrigin, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM group_link_import_detail d JOIN group_link_import_batch b ON d.batch_id = b.id WHERE ORDER BY d.batch_id DESC, d.line_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT d.line_no AS lineNo, d.group_name AS groupName, d.raw_url AS rawUrl, b.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, d.result AS result, d.success_type AS successType, d.fail_reason AS failReason, d.existing_origin AS existingOrigin, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM group_link_import_detail d JOIN group_link_import_batch b ON d.batch_id = b.id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.tenant_id = b.tenant_id AND d.result = 2 AND d.batch_id = #{batchId} AND b.label_id = #{labelId} ORDER BY d.batch_id DESC, d.line_no ASC
